reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the review, Stacy!   I am glad we met your expectations.   We wish you the BEST in your new position and for the New Year.

reviews.comment: Brian and Nick were great instructors. They were quick to respond to any emails and questions. Everything was clearly explained, practiced, and critiqued. Will definitely be using this service again for future certifications.

reviewReply.comment: Hearing that you had positive training experience is the best thing we could hope for! Your recommendation means a lot to us. Thank you for choosing Coastal Carolina CPR.   In the next month, we expect to be offering AHA's ACLS and PALS programs.  We look forward to working with you again soon.

reviews.comment: I took the BLS Renewal Class offered and the class setup/format was informative and well taught. The manikins were newer models than my hospital uses which was great. I would definitely recommend Coastal Carolina CPR.

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for the awesome review, Dorothy! We work hard to meet expectations like yours, and we’re happy to hear we hit the mark.    Have a great 2020!

reviews.comment: Brian responded almost instantly to any communication.  Nick has the heart of a teacher.  They made it possible for me to recertify on short notice.  Great experience!  I will be looking to them for my future certifications!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your kind words, Veronika. We really appreciate you taking the time out to share your experience with us—and we agree, Nick is truly a gem to have on our team! We count ourselves lucky for customers like you. We look forward to working with you again in the future!
